message:
🎯 JMUX CIO Presentation Ready — Mar 24, 2:25 PM EDT

Your final presentation script just arrived. Status confirmed:

✅ LOCKED IN:
• Phase 1: Nokia installs COMPLETE (all 31 sites)
• Hicksville-Syosset fiber ACTIVE
• NSP wiring at Hicksville DONE (today)
• BGP design APPROVED (Vikas sign-off)
• Northport DC power RESOLVED
• On budget ($6.6M, no variance)

🚨 CRITICAL NEXT 2 WEEKS:
• Mar 26 @ 3 PM → Phase 2 staging call
• Mar 27 → Nokia training dates finalized
• Mar 30 → IFR packages due (Green Acres, Berry St)
• Mar 31 → BGP CRB approval (final gate)
• Apr 1-2 → BGP EXECUTION (recovery milestone)

Once BGP is live Apr 1-2, SPI goes from YELLOW to GREEN and you're at full speed into Phase 2.

Biggest watch: iLO cable delivery this week (Bill on it) — critical for Mar 24-28 config window.

Presentation file: PRJ13797_JMUX_CIO_Update_March_Final_v2.pptx
